title: nidorella inuloides
intro: Nidorella inuloides, also known as the Cape daisy, is a flowering plant species native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nidorella inuloides include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
